role_summary: Command-line interface entry point and orchestration module for the wikifi tool, responsible for workspace lifecycle management and triggering the core code analysis pipeline.
extracted_finding: Manages the wikifi workspace by creating directories and default configuration files upon initialization. Orchestrates the primary analysis workflow via a walk command that automatically provisions missing workspaces, executes a technology-agnostic codebase scanning pipeline, and persists execution metadata including completion status and consolidated findings to a structured JSON summary. Serves as the primary user interaction layer, providing structured console feedback for operational states and pipeline results.
